content:
Hello! Pretty simple puzzle (Maybe too simple?), I think only reverse mode should be enabled, as there are no algorithmic “tricks” to be found...

Also, there is a missed opportunity regarding your constraint (“the length will not exceed 40”). Currently, your longest test (Validator 2) is exactly 32 bits.
To truly enforce your 40-bit constraint and catch players who forget to use 64-bit integers, you should add a test case with a binary string of 38 or 40 characters, at least.

✅ Approved the contribution.
Comment: its so cool!
